frames.name: Scientific Discovery Frame
frames.description: Presents this as a fundamental scientific breakthrough explaining a common phenomenon through rigorous research methodology
frames.emphasis: High-speed imaging, acoustic analysis, shear wave propagation, and the transition from irregular to coherent pulse dynamics

frames.name: Everyday Phenomenon Frame
frames.description: Frames the research as solving the mystery behind familiar squeaking sounds we encounter daily
frames.emphasis: Relatable examples like squeaky sneakers, bike brakes, rubber tires, and hip implants

frames.name: Cross-Disciplinary Applications Frame
frames.description: Emphasizes the broad implications across multiple fields from engineering to geology
frames.emphasis: Potential advances in engineering, metamaterials, earthquake research, and even musical instruments

frames.name: Technical Mechanism Frame
frames.description: Focuses on the specific physical processes and engineering solutions discovered
frames.emphasis: Opening pulse propagation, geometric confinement effects, and structure-driven stabilization mechanisms

outlierPerspectives: Connection to earthquake dynamics - only the video mentions that the squeaks are driven by 'pulses more commonly associated with the dynamics of earthquakes'
Lightning phenomenon - only the video notes 'tiny bolts of lightning initiating those pulses'
Musical instrument applications - only mentioned in the video as a potential application
